name: Loan Account Agent
description: Handles customer questions about loans including auto loans, personal loans, and mortgages. Can provide loan balances, payment details, loan terms, and process loan applications.

skills.name: Get Loan Balance
skills.description: Get the outstanding balance for a specific loan

skills.name: Get Loan Details
skills.description: Get full details for a specific loan including terms and payment info

skills.name: Get Payment Info
skills.description: Get the next payment date and amount for a loan

skills.name: List Loans
skills.description: List all loans for the customer

skills.name: Loan Application
skills.description: Process loan applications and determine eligibility for new loans
